title: ARCTIC MAN – AVALANCHE RESCUE WORKSHOP!!
summary: Join CNFAIC forecasters at ARCTIC MAN 2015 for a FREE avalanche rescue workshop!! In 2 hours we will teach you and your crew how to effect an efficient avalanche rescue. Bring your own gear or use ours. Free demos and prizes from Backcountry Access (including a set of BCA Link Radios!!) and special...
